narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 3-B (precinct in Medina County) has 1,387 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
